summary: Regression validation PASSED. All 15 venture-resolver unit tests pass. All 12 functional runtime checks pass. All 9 import paths from modified files resolve correctly to lib/venture-resolver.js. No test files directly related to the refactored modules are failing. The 136 pre-existing test failures are unrelated to this refactoring (EVA venture context, chairman decisions, brand variants, etc.). No residual hard-coded 'ehg' references remain in modified files. PR #1835 introduces no regressions.

checks.name: venture-resolver unit tests
checks.details: 15/15 tests pass in tests/unit/venture-resolver.test.js covering getVenturePath, getVentureConfig, listVentures, getGitHubRepo, getCurrentVenture

checks.name: functional runtime verification
checks.details: 12/12 runtime checks pass: getVenturePath resolves ehg to C:\Users\rickf\Projects\_EHG\ehg, EHG_Engineer to repo root, null to ENGINEER_ROOT; getVentureConfig returns correct registry data; listVentures returns 2 active entries; getGitHubRepo strips .git suffix; getCurrentVenture returns EHG_Engineer

checks.name: import path resolution
checks.details: All 9 files importing venture-resolver.js have correct relative paths that resolve to lib/venture-resolver.js on disk

checks.name: full test suite regression
checks.details: 491 test files: 354 passed, 136 failed, 1 skipped. 9343 tests: 8349 passed, 930 failed, 64 skipped. No failures in files touched by this refactoring. All failures are pre-existing (EVA, chairman, marketing, brand variants, database validation, etc.)

checks.name: no residual hard-coded references
checks.details: No remaining hard-coded 'ehg' string literals in the 14 modified files. Remaining 'EHG_Engineer' fallback strings in 4 retrospective files are appropriate defaults (sd.target_application || 'EHG_Engineer')

checks.name: venture-resolver exports API
checks.details: Module exports 6 named functions (getVenturePath, getVentureConfig, listVentures, getGitHubRepo, getCurrentVenture, clearRegistryCache) plus default export object including ENGINEER_ROOT constant. All functions are callable.

checks.name: registry dependency
checks.details: applications/registry.json exists and is valid JSON with 2 active applications (ehg, test-leo-project). venture-resolver gracefully falls back to minimal registry if file is missing.

checks.name: modified files exist on disk
checks.details: All 10 files verified to exist: lib/venture-resolver.js (NEW), 9 modified files with venture-resolver imports
